professor.title: 讲师/Lecturer
professor.biography_text: 个人简历(Biography) 教育背景:(Educational Background) Sept 2012 ~ Present PhD Candidate in Institute of Education at BIT Sept 1992 ~ June 1999 Received Master's degree at BIT, Department of Computer Science, June 1999 Received Bachelor's degree at BIT, Department of Computer Science, June 1996 工作经历:(Working Experience) Sept 1999 ~ Present Instructor at Beijing Institute of Technology International Affairs Coordinator of School of Software Taught the following courses *bilingually or in English*: Computer Science Foundations (head teacher), Web Design Basics (head teacher), C Programming, English for Software Engineers, Electronic Commerce, Web Publishing with HTML&XHTML, Management Information Systems, etc., some rated as high as 97% by students Published more than 20 books on computer applications, several selected as National Level Planned Textbooks Published several academic papers Sept 2004 ~ Sept 2005 Visiting scholar at University of California, San Diego Researched at Interactive Cognition Laboratory Worked as TA at Department of Cognitive Science
